ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-07-2026 Continued To Mar-10-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jay Greene for executor Mark Foster (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Greene reported that the estate is in the process of obtaining waivers from the beneficiaries and stated that, if waivers cannot be obtained, an accounting will be prepared prior to filing a final petition.

Following discussion, the Court continued the matter to March 10, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-26-2025 Continued To Jan-07-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jay Greene for executor Mark Foster (via Zoom).

The matter was called for hearing on Status on Close of Estate.

Mr. Greene reported that the petition for final distribution is prepared, but that he was still waiting for waivers of accounting from the will beneficiaries. He requested additional time to obtain the waivers and file the final petition, or if unsuccessful, to file a status report.

The Court continued the matter to January 7, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Nov-04-2025 Continued To Nov-26-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Sep-23-2025 Continued To Nov-04-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-13-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Colin Turner in propria persona.

Mr. Turner stated that he is not objecting to the petition. This matter was put on for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated December 26, 2022 is admitted to probate. Mark Foster is appointed as the Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for September 23, 2025, at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will go off calendar. Frank Mahoney III is appointed probate referee.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Aguerre. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Jul-02-2024 Continued To Aug-13-24 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
